title: Brachiaria brevispicata
taxonomy: Brachiaria brevispicata belongs to the family Poaceae. This family is commonly known as the grass family. Brachiaria brevispicata is also a member of the tribe Paniceae. Within the tribe Paniceae, it is classified as part of the genus Brachiaria. It is a type of grass that is native to tropical and subtropical regions.

intro: Brachiaria brevispicata, also known as short-spiked brachiaria, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. The health benefits of Brachiaria brevispicata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve blood sugar control, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
